EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the sixth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Lead_6th Attempt_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Insurance quote request final follow up
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
As I’ve not heard back from any of my previous attempts to provide you with a quote for your business insurance, I will now be closing your records on our system.
However, if you are interested in proceeding with your quote at any time in the future - book a call with me - https://calendly.com/d/cm3g-k74-js2/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back
Alternatively, you can always give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
